response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video for vocal music. The VTuber, Hakui Koyori, speaks throughout the first section (00:00-03:32) introducing merchandise. From 03:33 to the end (04:36), there is a promotional slide with instrumental background music. No vocal songs were detected in this segment.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Hakui Koyori introducing birthday merchandise, followed by a promotional slide with instrumental background music.
